# Part 1: Dự đoán tỷ lệ tội phạm bạo lực trong các cộng đồng (Communities and Crime)

```{r p1-setup, include=FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("here", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("here")
source(here::here("config", "setup.R"))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.align = "center")
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_1_CommunityCrime","Part_1_CommunityCrime_ABCD.Rmd")}
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_1_CommunityCrime","Part_2_CommunityCrime_EF.Rmd")}
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_1_CommunityCrime","Part_3_CommunityCrime_GH.Rmd")}
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_1_CommunityCrime","Part_4_CommunityCrime_I.Rmd")}
```
